---
name: Design proposal
about: Propose a UX or visual design change (no code required)
title: "[design] "
labels: design
---

## What you're proposing

The design change, in plain language.

## Why

What's wrong or missing today, and who it affects.

## Visuals

Mockups, sketches, references, or a Figma link. Even a rough sketch helps.

## Principles check

- [ ] Consistent with the [design principles](../../design/principles.md)
- [ ] Accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA — contrast, focus, screen readers)
- [ ] This touches the **design system** (tokens / patterns) and so needs an
      [RFC](../../product/rfc)
